calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-07-2007 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-28-2006 Set For Trial On Mar-05-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Feb-14-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 514

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2007 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2006 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-07-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ. Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Mark Epstein, Esq. for Petitioner: Cheryl Christenson, present as Guardian at litem for and with: Michael Christenson, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $3,281.00
Costs $706.00
A net balance of $9,138.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, Ocean Avenue Branch, San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2006 Set For Trial On Feb-20-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-31-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 622
